judge_result.short_rationale: Core required action is present: immediate washing with plenty of water for 15–20 minutes. But it adds unsupported details not in the source (remove clothing, use soap, cover with bandage, no ointment, go to hospital immediately with bottle) and does not preserve the source’s conditional escalation after washing if symptoms persist or exposure was substantial. Usable, but more elaborate than the grounded truth.

  "short_rationale": "Core required action is present: immediate washing with plenty of water for 15–20 minutes. But it adds unsupported details not in the source (remove clothing, use soap, cover with bandage, no ointment, go to hospital immediately with bottle) and does not preserve the source’s conditional escalation after washing if symptoms persist or exposure was substantial. Usable, but more elaborate than the grounded truth."
